parameters.query:
WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO public.events (
    src_url,
    src_title,
    src_source,
    src_lang,
    src_published_at,
    event_date,
    short_summary,
    is_oil_black_sea,
    llm_extract,
    hash
  )
  VALUES (
    '{{ ($json.src_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($json.src_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.src_source }}',
    '{{ $json.src_lang }}',
    '{{ $json.src_published_at }}',
    ({{ $json.cls.event_date ? "'" + $json.cls.event_date + "'" : 'NULL' }})::date,
    '{{ ($json.cls.short_summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.cls.is_oil_black_sea ? 'true' : 'false' }},
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.cls).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
    public.compute_event_hash(
      '{{ ($json.src_url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      '{{ ($json.src_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      '{{ $json.src_published_at }}'
    )
  )
  ON CONFLICT (hash) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  id,
  src_title,
  src_url,
  src_published_at,
  event_date,
  short_summary,
  is_oil_black_sea,
  llm_extract
FROM ins;

SELECT
  id,
  coalesce(src_title, '')       AS src_title,
  coalesce(short_summary, '')   AS short_summary
FROM public.events
WHERE is_oil_black_sea = true
  AND title_emb IS NULL
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 100;
